title: Smart Commit: Spanish conjugation regressions
original_text: Added regression tests for Spanish first-person and team conjugations such as arreglé, añadimos, mejoramos, and documentamos. The tests verify that common Spanish summaries no longer fall back to actualiza proyecto and that ci does not match inside instrucciones.
expected_body_lines: - Add regression cases for arreglé and añadimos
- Add regression cases for mejoramos and documentamos
- Verify Spanish summaries avoid actualiza proyecto fallback
expected_command: git commit -m "test(nlp): cover Spanish conjugation regressions"
